scripts.cloudflare:d1:migrate:local: CLOUDFLARE_LOAD_DEV_VARS_FROM_DOT_ENV=false WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.cloudflare:dry-run: npm run bundle --workspace @counterpoint/web && CLOUDFLARE_LOAD_DEV_VARS_FROM_DOT_ENV=false WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.jsonc --outdir .wrangler/dry-run
scripts.cloudflare:smoke:local: npm run cloudflare:d1:migrate:local && npm run bundle --workspace @counterpoint/web && node scripts/cloudflare-local-smoke.mjs
scripts.cloudflare:e2e: npm run cloudflare:d1:migrate:local && npm run bundle --workspace @counterpoint/web && npx playwright test --config playwright.cloudflare.config.ts
scripts.cloudflare:types: CLOUDFLARE_LOAD_DEV_VARS_FROM_DOT_ENV=false WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false wrangler types apps/worker/src/worker-configuration.d.ts --config wrangler.jsonc --env-interface WorkerBindings --include-runtime false
scripts.cloudflare:types:check: CLOUDFLARE_LOAD_DEV_VARS_FROM_DOT_ENV=false WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false wrangler types apps/worker/src/worker-configuration.d.ts --config wrangler.jsonc --env-interface WorkerBindings --include-runtime false --check
scripts.dev:worker: npm run bundle --workspace @counterpoint/web && CLOUDFLARE_LOAD_DEV_VARS_FROM_DOT_ENV=false WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false wrangler dev --config wrangler.jsonc --ip 0.0.0.0
scripts.security:matrix: vitest run tests/unit/application/authorization.test.ts tests/unit/application/sessions.test.ts tests/unit/application/display-tokens.test.ts tests/unit/application/artifacts.test.ts tests/unit/application/disclosures.test.ts tests/unit/adapters-node/safe-url-fetcher.test.ts tests/unit/adapters-node/artifact-text-extractor.test.ts tests/unit/adapters-node/webhook-verifier.test.ts tests/unit/adapters-openai/private-disclosure.test.ts tests/unit/adapters-openai/realtime-calls.test.ts tests/unit/adapters-openai/realtime-client-secrets.test.ts tests/unit/adapters-openai/realtime-sideband.test.ts tests/unit/adapters-openai/realtime-usage.test.ts tests/unit/server/realtime.test.ts tests/unit/web/realtime-openai.test.ts tests/contract/protocol-errors.test.ts tests/integration/server-http.test.ts tests/integration/server-websocket.test.ts
scripts.security:verify: npm run build && npm run security:secrets && npm run security:matrix && npm run test:cloudflare
scripts.test:cloudflare: npm run build --workspace @counterpoint/protocol && npm run build --workspace @counterpoint/adapters-cloudflare && npm run build --workspace @counterpoint/worker && CLOUDFLARE_LOAD_DEV_VARS_FROM_DOT_ENV=false WRANGLER_LOG_PATH=.wrangler/wrangler.log WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false vitest run --config vitest.cloudflare.config.ts
